name: instagram-publisher
description: Publish Instagram photos, reels, and carousels through the Instagram Graph API.

interface.shortDescription: Publish photos, reels, and carousels to Instagram without a browser.
interface.longDescription: Instagram Publisher helps Codex turn publishing requests into direct Instagram Graph API commands. It supports public URLs, local files through Tailscale Funnel, captions, scheduling, user tags, alt text, and comment controls.
